# arubasdwan_vrf_segments (Data Source)

Fetches VRF segments and zone-to-VRF mappings from the Orchestrator. Optionally resolves a segment_pair from VRF names. Use zone_mappings to look up the VRF-specific zone ID for security policies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_vrf_segments" "default" {
  source_vrf = "Default"
  dest_vrf   = "Default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `dest_vrf` (String) Destination VRF name to resolve into a segment pair. Optional.
- `source_vrf` (String) Source VRF name to resolve into a segment pair. Optional.

### Read-Only

- `segment_pair` (String) Resolved segment pair (e.g. "0_1"). Computed from source_vrf and dest_vrf.
- `segments` (Attributes List) List of all VRF segments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--segments))
- `zone_mappings` (Attributes List) Zone-to-VRF assignments. Each zone has a unique ID per VRF. Use this to find the correct zone_id for a given zone name and VRF. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--zone_mappings))

<a id="nestedatt--segments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `segments`

Read-Only:

- `comment` (String) Segment comment.
- `id` (Number) Segment ID.
- `name` (String) Segment name.
- `status` (Number) Segment status.


<a id="nestedatt--zone_mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `zone_mappings`

Read-Only:

- `vrf_id` (Number) VRF segment ID.
- `vrf_name` (String) VRF segment name.
- `zone_id` (Number) Zone ID (unique per VRF).
- `zone_name` (String) Zone name.
